title: daemon jmap space_get issues N+1 queries for member lists
description: space_get (jmap.rs lines 955-962) calls get_space_members once per requested space ID inside a loop. For a request with N space IDs this issues N+1 SQL round-trips. Under a workload with many spaces this becomes a latency bottleneck. Fix: add a bulk get_space_members_for_spaces(ids) query using WHERE space_id IN (...).
